name: postman-data-parsing-demos
description: Educational demonstrations of CSV/JSON data parsing in Postman/Newman for BASF interview preparation

scripts.demo:all:
npm run demo:parse && echo '

===== CSV ITERATION =====
' && npm run demo:iterate:csv && echo '

===== JSON ITERATION =====
' && npm run demo:iterate:json && echo '

===== COMPARISON =====
' && npm run demo:compare
scripts.demo:quick: npm run demo:parse && npm run demo:compare

author: BASF Interview Preparation
